props.SQL:
Select
  l.LNH_ID,
  l.LNH_NOME,
  l.LNH_CODIGO,
  Case When l.LNH_ID_MAE Is Not Null Then (Select Max(SMB_LINHA.LNH_ID)
    From SMB_LINHA Where SMB_LINHA.LNH_CODIGO = l.LNH_CODIGO) Else l.LNH_ID
  End As Linha,
  (Select STRING_AGG(l2.LNH_CODIGO, ' - ') From SMB_LINHA l2
  Where l2.LNH_CODIGO = l.LNH_CODIGO) As LinhasFilhas
From
  SMB_LINHA l
  Left Join
  SMB_ITINERARIO i On l.LNH_ID = i.LNH_ID
  Left Join
  SMB_NIVEL_CONFORTO n On n.CON_ID = l.CON_ID
  Left Join
  SMB_AREA_JURISDICAO On SMB_AREA_JURISDICAO.AJ_ID = l.AJ_ID
  Left Join
  FR_USUARIO On FR_USUARIO.USR_CODIGO = SMB_AREA_JURISDICAO.USR_COD
/*WHERE_NEW*/
/*ORDER_NEW*/
